meaning: n.[希神]雅辛托斯(Apollo 所钟爱的美少年,被Apollo误杀后为纪念他使其血泊中长出风信子花)
examples: An endophytic fungus resistance to penicillin was isolated from hyacinthus orientalis by culturing on a preliminary screening medium.
He was passionately fond of a youth named Hyacinthus.
I know Hyacinthus, whom Apollo loved so madly, was you in Greek days.
